title: Round 3: Story Pressure
purpose: Apply Course 10 sustainability logic to a narrative pressure scene.

questions.prompt: Jordan has followed a routine for six months, but work stress disrupts consistency. What should Jordan focus on first?
options: A stricter routine with no flexibility
questions.hint: Course 10 emphasizes adapting through life changes instead of abandoning the goal.

questions.prompt: Jordan adds a workout partner or health coach. Which Course 10 concept is being used?
questions.hint: Accountability systems provide external structure for consistency.

questions.prompt: Jordan reframes setbacks as opportunities for what?
questions.hint: The Course 10 answer key frames setbacks as learning experiences.

questions.prompt: Jordan uses stress management and habit stacking to maintain progress. Which concept is this?
questions.hint: Behavioral adaptation means adjusting habits in response to life changes.
